BUILD.bazel.content:
"""tenant/library/go/ -- per-tenant Go subtree for the library tenant.

Holds kernel-grade go-cmd bricks moved out of m/go/cmd/ per AIDR-00141.
See aidr/00141-...md for the staged rollout. Forks inherit this entire
subtree via the bootstrap bundle; the module-path rewrite ensures the
fork's namesake CLI imports the rewritten library cmds.
"""

load("//kernel:fmt.bzl", "fmt_test")
load("//kernel:tagged.bzl", "tagged_file")

fmt_test(
    name = "build_bazel_fmt",
    src = "BUILD.bazel",
    tool = "buildifier",
)

tagged_file(
    name = "build_bazel_tag",
    src = "BUILD.bazel",
    tags = [
        "bazel",
        "bazel-build",
    ],
)
